name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Fork ownership *)
ForkOwner(i) == forks[i]

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ IsThinking(i)
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ IsHungry(i)
       /\ ForkOwner(LEFT(i)) = i
       /\ ForkOwner(RIGHT(i)) = i
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ IsEating(i)
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
        /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag[i] = TRUE
          /\ num[i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                j # i
                => (flag[j] = FALSE
                    \/ (num[j] < num[i]
                        \/ (num[j] = num[i]
                            /\ j < i)))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

Invariant == \A i, j \in 1..N :
                i # j
                /\ flag[i] = TRUE
                /\ flag[j] = TRUE
                /\ (num[i] < num[j]
                    \/ (num[i] = num[j]
                        /\ i < j))

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ size < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ size' = size + 1
        /\ q' = Append(q, head)
  \/ /\ size > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ size' = size - 1
        /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm'}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(chunks) = Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = 0
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ Len(retransmitCount) = 0
    /\ ackedChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(ackedChunks) = 0

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks :
        /\ chunk \notin sentChunks
        /\ chunk \notin ackedChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
        /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(sentChunks) :
        /\ sentChunks[i] \notin ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1

        /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(sentChunks) :
        /\ sentChunks[i] \notin ackedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] = MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ ackedChunks' = Append(ackedChunks, sentChunks[i])

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES infected, known

Init == /\ infected = <<>> 
        /\ known = <<>> 

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected, known>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
          /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client : IsFiniteSet(allocated[c])

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
        /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node:
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]]
          /\ \A m \in Node: counts'[n][m] \in Nat
          /\ \A m \in Node: counts'[n][m] >= counts[n][m]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
